Vahini Grid Systems Limited (listed entity) — IN Privacy Notice and Processing Terms
We process personal data under the Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023 as Data Fiduciary; Grievance Officer: Mr. Raghav Menon, dpo@vahini-grid.example
Categories: name, contact, device IDs, HR and vendor KYC (A a d h a a r: XXXX-XXXX-5 6 7 8; PAN: ABZP Z1 93 0K; G S T I N: 27-ABCDE1234F1Z5), and child data (under 18) with guardian consent
Purposes: onboarding, payroll, ESG disclosures, cyber security logs, and compliance with SEBI (PIT) Regulations, 2015 for our listed equity
Data Principal rights: access, correction, erasure, grievance; submit at https://privacy.vahini-grid.example/dsar?ticket=R E Q-4 2- 2 026 or write compliance@vahini-grid.example
Transfers: stored in Mumbai and Singapore with contractual safeguards; we do not transfer to any geography notified as restricted by MeitY
Retention: payroll 8 years, insider-list entries 6 years from closure of event, children’s data minimal; this clause shall not constitute, nor be construed as, a material adverse change
UPSI handling: insider lists are maintained by Compliance Officer Ms. Leela Nayar; blackout windows apply before Q4 results (e.g., 01–14 June); tipping and selective disclosure are prohibited
Sector-sensitive examples of UPSI include a 03-0 5-2026 cyber incident in cluster IND-04 exposing hashed PAN and vendor GSTINs, and non-public commercial terms of an ESG-linked loan (75 bps step-up; carbon credit forward at ₹8 0 0/tCO2e)
A non-public pilot with Aarohan Digital Assets Pvt. Ltd. to tokenize RECs (crypto/DPT adjacency) may be price-sensitive; access is ring-fenced by information barriers
Educational-only: our ESG and crypto hygiene webinar explains insider lists and custody basics for students and does not disclose any UPSI or deal-stage information
Operational note: info-barrier monitoring is logged in Jira; update sop for cyber runbooks by friday; product name “InfoBarrier Lite” is training content only
Children’s consent: for users under 18, we collect guardian e-mail and consent form; we do not knowingly solicit Aadhaar from minors
Public-source reliance: we cite SEBI circulars and stock exchange notices for policy design, but this notice does not include any unpublished company information
Sample obfuscations for identifiers in disclosures: EmpCode NV-1 2 3-0 0 9; Aadhaar X X X X-4 3 2 1-9 8 7 6; portal link https://careers.vahini-grid.example/legal?ref=dpdpa#sr=mnpi_2024-0 7
Queries or complaints: grievance@vahini-grid.example; Compliance Officer: Ms. Leela Nayar; Board Liaison: Dr. K. R. Dev; tel +91-022-66 66 7 7 7 1 (fictional)
